languages.text: {n}Капитан-интендант ловит взгляд полковника, а затем выступает вперед.{/n} "32-ой меровский штрафной полк был реквизирован много веков назад Вольным Торговцем, Себерианом фон Валанциусом. Во время экспедиции на GH-89-717, которую мы сейчас зовем Зарковом, Лорд-капитан сгинул в корнях. Его свита принесла Последний Приказ, поднялась на борт корабля и больше не вернулась. С тех пор мы ждали. Ждали вас, Ваша Светлость!"

{n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан-интендант ловит взгляд полковника, а затем выступает вперед.{/n} "32-ой меровский штрафной полк был реквизирован много веков назад Вольным Торговцем, Себерианом фон Валанциусом. Во время экспедиции на GH-89-717, которую мы сейчас зовем Зарковом, Лорд-капитан сгинул в корнях. Его свита принесла Последний Приказ, поднялась на борт корабля и больше не вернулась. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and never returned. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

{n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not returned. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

{n}The captain-quartermaster throws back her shoulders and proudly proclaims, {/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Seberian von Valancius. But during an expedition to GH-89-717, the Lord Captain was lost in the depths of the root system. The ship left orbit and never came back for us. Until today, that is."

languages.text: {n}艦長兼副長は肩をすくめて誇らしげに宣言する。{/n}「32番メローフ連隊は、数世紀前にヴァランシウス・シベリアによって徴用された。しかし、GH-89-717への遠征中に、艦長は根系に迷い込んだ。艦は軌道から離れ、二度と戻ってこなかった。今日まで」
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster throws back her shoulders and proudly proclaims, {/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Seberian von Valancius. But during an expedition to GH-89-717, the Lord Captain was lost in the depths of the root system. The ship left orbit and never came back for us. Until today, that is."

traits.locale_text: {n}艦長兼副長は肩をすくめて誇らしげに宣言する。{n}「32番メローフ連隊は、数世紀前にヴァランシウス・シベリアによって徴用された。しかし、GH-89-717への遠征中に、艦長は根系に迷い込んだ。艦は軌道から離れ、二度と戻ってこなかった。今日まで。」

languages.text: {n}Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin erwidert den Blick des Colonels und tritt vor.{/n} "Das 32. Merov-Strafregiment wurde vor mehreren Jahrhunderten von Freihändler Seberian von Valancius requiriert. Während einer Expedition nach GH-89-717, dem heutigen Zarkov, ist der Lord Captain in den Wurzeln verschwunden. Sein Gefolge überbrachte uns den letzten Befehl, ging auf das Schiff und kehrte nie zurück. Seitdem haben wir gewartet. Auf Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin erwidert den Blick des Colonels und tritt vor.{/n} "Das 32. Merov-Strafregiment wurde vor mehreren Jahrhunderten von Freihändler Seberian von Valancius requiriert. Während einer Expedition nach GH-89-717, dem heutigen Zarkov, ist der Lord Captain in den Wurzeln verschwunden. Sein Gefolge überbrachte uns den letzten Befehl, ging auf das Schiff und kehrte nie zurück. Seitdem haben wir gewartet. Auf Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"

languages.text: {n}La capitaine-quartier-maître croise le regard du colonel et avance d'un pas.{/n} « Le 32e régiment pénal de Merov a été réquisitionné il y a des siècles par le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius. Le seigneur-capitaine a disparu dans les racines lors d'une expédition sur GH-89-717, qu'on appelle désormais Zarkov. Son entourage a décrété l'Ordre ultime avant de monter à bord du vaisseau pour ne plus jamais revenir. Et depuis tout ce temps, nous attendions votre venue, Votre Seigneurie ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine-quartier-maître croise le regard du colonel et avance d'un pas.{/n} « Le 32e régiment pénal de Merov a été réquisitionné il y a des siècles par le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius. Le seigneur-capitaine a disparu dans les racines lors d'une expédition sur GH-89-717, qu'on appelle désormais Zarkov. Son entourage a décrété l'Ordre ultime avant de monter à bord du vaisseau pour ne plus jamais revenir. Et depuis tout ce temps, nous attendions votre venue, Votre Seigneurie ! »

languages.text: {n}La capitana-intendente mira a los ojos del coronel y da un paso al frente.{/n} «El 32.º regimiento penal de Merov fue requisado hace siglos por el Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius. Durante una expedición al planeta GH-89-717, conocido ahora como Zarkov, el Lord Capitán se perdió entre las raíces. Su séquito trajo la última orden, subió a la nave y no volvió. Llevamos esperando desde entonces. ¡Esperándole a usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}!».
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana-intendente mira a los ojos del coronel y da un paso al frente.{/n} «El 32.º regimiento penal de Merov fue requisado hace siglos por el Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius. Durante una expedición al planeta GH-89-717, conocido ahora como Zarkov, el Lord Capitán se perdió entre las raíces. Su séquito trajo la última orden, subió a la nave y no volvió. Llevamos esperando desde entonces. ¡Esperándole a usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}!».

languages.text: {n}Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, Albay'ın gözlerine bakıp öne çıkıyor.{/n} "32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı, yüzyıllar önce Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius tarafından talep edilmişti. Şimdi Zarkov olarak adlandırılan GH-89-717'ye yapılan bir keşif seferi sırasında Lord Kaptan, köklerin arasında kayboldu. Maiyeti; Son Emir'i getirdi, gemiye bindi ve bir daha geri dönmedi. O zamandan beri bekliyoruz. Sizi bekledik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!"
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

Şimdi Zarkov olarak adlandırılan GH-89-717'ye yapılan bir keşif seferi sırasında Lord Kaptan, köklerin arasında kayboldu. Maiyeti; Son Emir'i getirdi, gemiye bindi ve bir daha geri dönmedi. O zamandan beri bekliyoruz. Sizi bekledik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!"

languages.text: {n}军需官上尉与上校对视一眼，走上前来。{/n}“梅罗夫第32判罪军团，数个世纪前由行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯征召。在一次前往GH-89-717——也就是现在的扎尔科夫——的远征中，舰长大人迷失于根系之中。他的随从带来了‘最后的命令’，随后登上舰船，再也没有回来。从那时起，我们便一直在等。我们一直在等您，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster meets the colonel's eyes and steps forward.{/n} "The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment was requisitioned centuries ago by Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. During an expedition to GH-89-717, which is now called Zarkov, the Lord Captain was lost in the roots. His retinue brought the Final Order, boarded the ship, and did not return. We have waited ever since. We have waited for you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: {n}军需官上尉与上校对视一眼，走上前来。{/n}“梅罗夫第32判罪军团，数个世纪前由行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯征召。在一次前往GH-89-717——也就是现在的扎尔科夫——的远征中，舰长大人迷失于根系之中。他的随从带来了‘最后的命令’，随后登上舰船，再也没有回来。从那时起，我们便一直在等。我们一直在等您，舰长大人！”
